name: cdc-errors
description: Single-plugin marketplace for error-handling: RFC 9457 dual-consumer CLI error envelopes, source-code error-handling review, and LLM-agent consumer-side interpretation of those envelopes.

plugins.name: error-handling
plugins.description: Three sibling skills covering the full CLI/code error-handling lifecycle: cdc-err (RFC 9457 dual-consumer envelopes for CLI output), cdc-review (source-code error-handling review across any language), and cdc-handle (LLM-agent consumer-side interpretation and action on cdc-err envelopes in tool_result payloads).
